_comment: Autivora real catalog v1. Specs grounded in real-market research (Amazon/Target/Walmart/Nebu/VEVOR/Aroma360/Aroma Designers, June 2026). SEO copy is original. Prices are proposed retail. 'sourcing_reference' = comparable real product to source against (NOT to copy images/text from). 'image' = TODO: your own product photo. Re-run build-csv.mjs after editing.
tagline: Excellence in Air — Cold-Air Diffusion for Every Space

collections.title: Car Diffusers
collections.description: Waterless, cold-air scent diffusers built for your cabin — cup-holder and vent-ready, USB-C rechargeable.

collections.title: Home Diffusers
collections.description: Whole-home and large-room cold-air diffusers. App-controlled, waterless, HVAC-ready.

collections.title: Commercial & Industrial
collections.description: High-capacity HVAC scent systems for hotels, gyms, showrooms and large facilities — up to 15,000 sq ft.

collections.title: Fragrance Oils
collections.description: Pure, water-free fragrance oils engineered for cold-air diffusion. The refill line behind every Autivora device.

collections.title: Car Accessories
collections.description: Refillable clips and add-ons that extend your Autivora scent to every corner of the cabin.

collections.title: Autivora for Business
collections.description: Custom-branded scent for dealerships, hotels, gyms and gifting. Your logo, your scent, at volume.

products.title: Autivora Drive — Cold-Air Car Diffuser

specs.coverage: Vehicle cabin / up to 400 sq ft
specs.tech: Waterless cold-air nebulization (no heat, no water)

products.seo_title: Autivora Drive | Waterless Cold-Air Car Diffuser (USB-C)
products.seo_description: Turn your cabin into a signature scent. The Autivora Drive nebulizes pure fragrance oil — no water, no heat — with up to 24h battery, USB-C charging, and 3 intensity levels. Fits any cup holder.
products.body_html:
Your car should smell like your taste, not a gas-station tree. Autivora Drive uses waterless cold-air nebulization to turn pure fragrance oil into a fine, even mist — no heat, no water, no diluted scent.

  • Up to 24h on a charge, USB-C rechargeable
  • 3 intensity levels + 1/2/4-hour timers
  • Fits standard cup holders — 4" tall
  • Whisper-quiet, waterless cold-air diffusion

Pairs with any Autivora Fragrance Oil.
products.sourcing_reference: Comparable: Nebu NL50 ($55), Airversa AN6, Di'Aroma 50ml (Target). Source 10ml waterless nebulizing car unit, metal-accent finish.

products.title: Autivora Drive Mini — Portable Car Diffuser
products.seo_title: Autivora Drive Mini | Compact Waterless Car Diffuser
products.seo_description: The entry into cold-air car scenting. Compact, USB-C rechargeable, waterless nebulizing diffuser. Pure fragrance, no water, no heat. Perfect first device or gift.
products.body_html:
Autivora Drive Mini brings waterless cold-air scenting to any cabin in a compact, vent-ready form. USB-C rechargeable, two intensity levels, pure-oil nebulization.

  • Up to 12h battery, USB-C
  • 2 intensity levels
  • Compact, vent-clip friendly
products.sourcing_reference: Comparable: budget 5-10ml USB nebulizing car units ($13-25 on Amazon). Entry tier.

products.title: Autivora Home — Whole-House HVAC Diffuser

specs.control: Wi-Fi + Bluetooth app, scheduling by room/time/intensity
specs.install: Standalone or HVAC-connected, no ductwork changes

products.seo_title: Autivora Home | Whole-House HVAC Scent Diffuser (5,000 sq ft)
products.seo_description: Scent your whole home from one device. Autivora Home covers up to 5,000 sq ft with waterless cold-air diffusion, Wi-Fi app scheduling, and HVAC-ready install. No water, no heat, no aerosols.
products.body_html:
Autivora Home turns your whole house into a signature scent environment. Cold-air nebulization pushes a fine, even fragrance through your space — or straight into your HVAC — with no water, no heat, and no aerosol propellant.

  • Up to 5,000 sq ft coverage
  • Wi-Fi + Bluetooth app — schedule intensity by room, time, or season
  • 1,000ml capacity for weeks of runtime
  • Standalone or HVAC-connected — no ductwork changes
  • Premium metal housing
products.sourcing_reference: Comparable: Lacidoll 5000sqft ($150-200), VEVOR 850ml ($80-130), Scentiment Diffuser Pro 2. Source 1000ml WiFi HVAC cold-air unit, metal.

products.title: Autivora Home Room — Large-Room Diffuser
products.seo_title: Autivora Home Room | Large-Room Cold-Air Diffuser (1,500 sq ft)
products.seo_description: Standalone cold-air diffuser for living rooms, suites, and open spaces up to 1,500 sq ft. Waterless, quiet, Bluetooth-controlled. Pure fragrance oil, no water.
products.body_html:
Autivora Home Room delivers whole-room cold-air scenting without plumbing into your HVAC. Standalone, quiet, and Bluetooth-controlled for spaces up to 1,500 sq ft.

  • Up to 1,500 sq ft
  • 300ml capacity
  • Touch + Bluetooth control
  • Waterless cold-air nebulization
products.sourcing_reference: Comparable: 300-500ml standalone cold-air room diffusers ($60-110). Mid tier.

products.title: Autivora Pro — Commercial Scent System
products.seo_title: Autivora Pro | Commercial & Industrial HVAC Scent System
products.seo_description: Scent marketing at scale. Autivora Pro covers 10,000+ sq ft for hotels, gyms, showrooms and facilities — waterless cold-air, 1,500ml tank, app + touchscreen scheduling, 24/7 operation.
products.body_html:
Autivora Pro is built for square footage retail diffusers can't touch — hotels, gyms, showrooms, lobbies and facilities. Commercial-grade cold-air nebulization fills 10,000+ sq ft with consistent, even scent, 24/7.

  • 10,000+ sq ft coverage
  • 1,500ml tank for continuous operation
  • App + touchscreen, multi-zone scheduling
  • HVAC-connectable, wall-mount or standalone

Need a larger footprint or multi-unit install? Request a quote.
products.sourcing_reference: Comparable: Aroma Designers L150 (15,000 sqft), commercial 800ml 3500-7500sqft ($200-400 Amazon), Charm CH123 1000ml. Source 1500-2500ml HVAC commercial unit.

products.title: Autivora Clip — Refillable Metal Car Diffuser
products.seo_title: Autivora Clip | Refillable Metal Car Vent Diffuser
products.seo_description: A solid-metal, refillable vent clip that carries your Autivora scent through the cabin — no battery, no waste. Adjustable intensity, 30–90 days per refill. Pairs with any Autivora oil.
products.body_html:
Autivora Clip is the everyday companion to your diffuser — a weighted metal vent clip you refill with Autivora oil instead of throwing away. No battery, no cords, just adjustable, all-day scent.

  • Solid aluminum / zinc-alloy build
  • Refillable — 30–90 days per refill, zero waste
  • Adjustable airflow intensity
  • Clips to any standard car vent

Refill it with any Autivora Fragrance Oil.
products.sourcing_reference: Maps to candidates #18 & #25. Comparable: Drift metal car freshener (refill subscription), Maison Berger chrome clip, AREON premium. Source refillable metal vent clip, MOQ low.

products.title: Autivora for Business — Custom-Logo Leather Car Diffuser
products.seo_title: Custom-Logo Leather Car Air Freshener | Autivora for Business
products.seo_description: Premium leather car diffusers branded with your logo — for dealerships, hotels, and corporate gifts. Refillable, customizable, ordered at volume. Request a bulk quote.
products.body_html:
Autivora for Business — Leather Edition. A premium lambskin-wrapped car diffuser embossed with your logo. The drive-away gift that keeps your brand in the cabin for months.

  • Genuine / premium leather wrap, your logo embossed
  • Refillable scent insert — recurring brand impressions
  • Dealerships, hotels, real-estate closings, corporate gifting
  • From ~50 units · ~2–3 week lead time

Pricing shown is indicative per-unit at volume. Request a bulk quote for your logo and quantity.
products.sourcing_reference: Maps to candidate #21. Comparable: Aromahpure leather car perfume, Delicate-Leather custom-logo. Low-competition B2B SEO lane.

products.title: Autivora for Business — Custom-Logo Air Fresheners (Bulk)

specs.material: High-density absorbent board, die-cut to shape

products.seo_title: Custom Logo Car Air Fresheners in Bulk | Autivora for Business
products.seo_description: Personalized car air fresheners printed with your logo — die-cut to any shape, 50+ scents, low minimums. Perfect for dealerships, events, and promo. Get a bulk quote.
products.body_html:
Autivora for Business — Custom Fresheners. Die-cut, double-sided, full-color air fresheners printed with your logo or QR code. The cheapest brand impression that rides along for weeks.

  • Die-cut to your logo or any shape
  • 50+ Autivora fragrances
  • Low minimums (~50) · ~5–8 day turnaround
  • Dealerships, events, real estate, promotions

Pricing shown is indicative per-unit at volume. Request a bulk quote.
products.sourcing_reference: Maps to candidate #27. Comparable: NippyCustom (from $0.39/unit), personalized air fresheners. High-intent B2B keywords, real volume play.

oil_line._comment: Refill fragrance oils — the recurring-revenue engine. Each scent = one product with 2 size variants. Scent names are PROPOSED — confirm/replace. Replaces test scents (Compassion/Savage/Vanilla Macadamia).
